# RIIMS — Rashtriya Institute of Integrated Medical Sciences

> Integrated, doctor-led kidney care in Baraut (Delhi-NCR region), India: high creatinine, CKD, kidney failure and dialysis guidance, plus liver, heart and metabolic care, with Ayurveda-supported lifestyle care alongside medical treatment — never instead of it. RIIMS never promises cure or that dialysis can be avoided.

Open 24 hours · +91 85120 40000 · Medicity Hospital, Kotana Rd, Baraut, Uttar Pradesh 250611

## Start here

- [Kidney Specialist in Delhi-NCR](https://riimshospitals.com/): Ethical, doctor-led kidney care across Delhi-NCR (based in Baraut, UP) — high creatinine, CKD, dialysis guidance, kidney diet & report review, with…
- [About RIIMS](https://riimshospitals.com/about.html): A kidney-focused institute in Baraut, UP for ethical, evidence-aware, report-based care — nephrology with Ayurveda-supported lifestyle guidance.
- [Our Doctors & Kidney Care Team](https://riimshospitals.com/doctors.html): Meet the RIIMS nephrology and integrated-care team — kidney specialists, physicians and renal dietitians providing ethical, doctor-led care in Baraut…
- [Kidney Treatments & Services](https://riimshospitals.com/services.html): Consultations (clinic, video, phone), report review, dialysis guidance, kidney diet plans, Ayurveda-supported lifestyle care and follow-up — at RIIMS…
- [DNA Kayakalp Protocol™ — Integrated Kidney Care](https://riimshospitals.com/dna-kayakalp-protocol.html): The DNA Kayakalp Protocol™ — RIIMS’s doctor-guided, integrated kidney-care framework (Diagnosis, Nutrition, Ayurveda-led activation) combining modern…
- [Contact & Book Appointment](https://riimshospitals.com/contact.html): Book a kidney consultation at RIIMS, Baraut. Call or WhatsApp +91 85120 40000, share reports securely, and choose video, phone or in-clinic care.

## Kidney conditions

- [High Creatinine](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/high-creatinine.html): High creatinine is a signal that the kidneys may be under strain — a marker to investigate calmly, not a diagnosis on its own. Doctor-led, report-based…
- [High Creatinine Treatment Without Dialysis](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/high-creatinine-without-dialysis.html): A raised creatinine does not mean dialysis. For most people it is managed with diet, lifestyle and treating the cause — honestly, without false promises…
- [Kidney Disease Treatment](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/kidney-disease-treatment.html): There is no single treatment for kidney disease — the right plan depends on the cause, the stage and your reports. Here is how RIIMS approaches it…
- [Chronic Kidney Disease (CKD)](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/ckd.html): CKD means the kidneys have been working below normal for months. With monitoring, diet and doctor-led care, its progression can often be slowed…
- [Stage 3 CKD Treatment](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/stage-3-ckd.html): Stage 3 is often when CKD is first found — and, with good care, many people stay stable here for years. This is the stage to act calmly and protect your…
- [Stage 4 CKD Treatment](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/stage-4-ckd.html): Stage 4 is advanced CKD — a time for careful, honest management to protect remaining function and plan ahead calmly, without panic. Doctor-led…
- [Kidney Failure](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/kidney-failure.html): Kidney failure (advanced CKD / stage 5) is life-changing news — but understanding your stage and options calmly is the first step to taking control…
- [Dialysis Support & Guidance](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/dialysis.html): Dialysis raises many questions and fears. We help you understand what it involves, when it is truly needed, and how to prepare — guided strictly by your…
- [Protein in Urine (Proteinuria)](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/proteinuria.html): Protein leaking into urine is an early, important signal from your kidneys. Caught early, the underlying cause can often be treated effectively…
- [Kidney Swelling (Edema) Treatment](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/kidney-swelling-treatment.html): Swelling in the feet, ankles or face can have many causes — the kidneys are an important one to check properly. Doctor-led, report-based kidney care at…
- [Diabetic Kidney Disease](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/diabetic-kidney-disease.html): Diabetes is the single biggest cause of kidney disease in India. The damage is silent for years — but screening and good control can substantially lower…
- [Hypertensive Kidney Disease](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/hypertensive-kidney-disease.html): High blood pressure both causes and results from kidney disease — a two-way link. Good BP and salt control is one of the strongest ways to protect the…
- [Kidney Stone Treatment](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/kidney-stone-treatment.html): Kidney stones are common and painful — but with the right evaluation and habits, most are treatable and many are preventable. Repeated stones deserve…
- [Urinary Tract Infection (UTI) Treatment](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/uti-treatment.html): UTIs are common and usually treatable — but a UTI with fever can involve the kidney, and repeated infections deserve a proper look at the cause…
- [Laser Kidney Stone Treatment (RIRS)](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/laser-kidney-stone-treatment.html): Laser (RIRS) stone treatment is one option for certain stones — but not every stone needs a procedure. Here is honest guidance on when it is truly needed…
- [High BP Kidney Treatment in Delhi NCR](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/high-bp-kidney-disease.html): Kidney care for high blood pressure is month-to-month work, not a one-time prescription. Here is what the treatment actually involves at RIIMS…

## Liver, heart & metabolic conditions

- [Liver Diseases & Treatment](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/): Fatty liver, a raised SGPT on a health check, jaundice, hepatitis, most liver problems are found on a report long before they are felt. These pages…
- [Heart & Blood Pressure Care](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/heart/): Blood pressure and cholesterol damage the heart and the kidneys together, usually without symptoms. These pages cover what the numbers mean, how risk is…
- [General & Lifestyle Diseases](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/): Diabetes, thyroid problems, obesity, high uric acid and vitamin deficiencies are common, treatable, and sit behind a large share of kidney and liver…
- [Raised SGPT / SGOT](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/raised-sgpt-sgot.html): A raised SGPT on a health check is a clue, not a diagnosis. It means the liver is irritated, and the next step is finding out why. Doctor-led…
- [Fatty Liver](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/fatty-liver.html): Fatty liver is common and usually silent. Your report needs two questions answered, not one: how much fat, and how much scarring, because they are not the…
- [Drug & Herb-Induced Liver Injury](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/drug-herb-induced-liver-injury.html): Herbs and supplements are not automatically safe for the liver, and pretending otherwise would not serve you. If you take any product, including one of…
- [Fatty Liver Grade 2 Treatment](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/fatty-liver-grade-2.html): Grade 2 on an ultrasound report is a common finding, and on its own it is not a reason to panic. It tells you how much fat is in the liver, not how much…
- [Fatty Liver Diet](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/fatty-liver-diet.html): There is no special fatty liver diet beyond an honestly balanced Indian plate, and that is good news: diet and activity are the most effective treatment…
- [Liver Function Test (LFT) Report Explained](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/liver-function-test-report.html): LFT stands for liver function test, but most of what it measures is liver damage, not liver function. Knowing the difference changes how you read your own…
- [Jaundice](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/jaundice.html): Jaundice, yellow eyes or skin, is a sign, not a disease in itself. The real work is finding out why it is happening, and doing that quickly. Doctor-led…
- [Hepatitis B](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/hepatitis-b.html): Hepatitis B is usually a long-term infection, not a short illness to get over. The honest news is that it can be controlled well in almost everyone, even…
- [Hepatitis C](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/hepatitis-c.html): Hepatitis C is one of the few chronic viral infections where tablets can clear the virus completely in the large majority of people. The real challenge is…
- [Liver Cirrhosis](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/liver-cirrhosis.html): Cirrhosis cannot be undone, but at every stage, treating the cause changes what happens next. Doctor-led, report-based care at RIIMS, Baraut, UP.
- [Alcoholic Liver Disease](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/alcoholic-liver-disease.html): Alcohol-related liver disease moves through stages, and there is real good news: the earlier stages improve substantially once alcohol stops, and even at…
- [Liver Abscess](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/liver/liver-abscess.html): A liver abscess is a serious infection, but a treatable one. In India it is most often amoebic, and catching it early makes the real difference…
- [Heart Attack Warning Signs](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/heart/heart-attack-warning-signs.html): Minutes matter with a heart attack. Know the warning signs, know how they differ from cardiac arrest, and know exactly what to do in the first few…
- [High Blood Pressure](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/heart/high-blood-pressure.html): High blood pressure usually causes no symptoms at all, which is exactly why it can quietly strain the heart, brain and kidneys for years before anyone…
- [Blood Pressure and Kidney Disease](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/heart/bp-and-kidney-disease.html): High blood pressure and kidney disease drive each other: high blood pressure damages the kidneys, and damaged kidneys make blood pressure harder to…
- [High Cholesterol](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/heart/high-cholesterol.html): A high cholesterol report rarely causes any symptoms at all. The real question is not the number by itself, but your overall heart risk. Doctor-led…
- [Triglycerides](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/heart/triglycerides.html): Raised triglycerides usually cause no symptoms, until they climb high enough to put the pancreas at risk, which is when they become an emergency…
- [Heart Failure](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/heart/heart-failure.html): Heart failure means the heart is still beating but struggles to pump or fill well enough. It is a serious diagnosis that calls for careful, ongoing…
- [Atrial Fibrillation](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/heart/atrial-fibrillation.html): Atrial fibrillation is an irregular heartbeat that often causes no symptoms at all, yet it is linked with roughly a fivefold increase in stroke risk…
- [Rheumatic Heart Disease](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/heart/rheumatic-heart-disease.html): Rheumatic heart disease damages heart valves, often decades after a childhood strep throat was never fully treated. The one genuinely preventable step is…
- [Diabetes and Kidney Disease](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/diabetes-and-kidney-disease.html): Diabetes is the single biggest cause of kidney disease in India, and the damage builds silently for years before creatinine ever moves. Good control on…
- [Uric Acid & Gout](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/uric-acid-gout.html): A high uric acid number on a health check is not automatically a disease, and gout, kidney stones and kidney disease are linked more closely than most…
- [Type 2 Diabetes](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/type-2-diabetes.html): Type 2 diabetes is a lifelong condition to manage, and for some people intensive weight loss can bring blood sugar into a normal range without medication…
- [Prediabetes](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/prediabetes.html): Prediabetes usually causes no symptoms at all, which is exactly why it matters: this is the stage where prevention still has the best odds of working…
- [Hypothyroidism](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/hypothyroidism.html): An underactive thyroid is common and treatable, but not every mildly raised TSH needs a tablet for life. The honest approach is to test properly, not to…
- [Hyperthyroidism](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/hyperthyroidism.html): An overactive thyroid speeds up nearly every system in the body. Most cases are managed well, but two warning signs on treatment need same-day attention…
- [Obesity](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/obesity.html): Obesity in India is best measured at the waist, not on the bathroom scale. A simple tape measure catches risk that weight alone can miss. Doctor-led…
- [Metabolic Syndrome](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/metabolic-syndrome.html): Metabolic syndrome is a cluster of risk factors, not a single disease, and together they raise the risk of diabetes and heart disease more than any one of…
- [Insulin Resistance](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/insulin-resistance.html): Insulin resistance sits behind prediabetes, fatty liver and metabolic syndrome, and it is often marketed with an expensive blood test that adds little for…
- [Vitamin D Deficiency](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/vitamin-d-deficiency.html): Vitamin D deficiency is one of the most over-tested and over-treated findings in Indian healthcare today. Most healthy adults do not need routine testing…
- [Vitamin B12 Deficiency](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/vitamin-b12-deficiency.html): Vitamin B12 deficiency causes two separate problems, anaemia and nerve damage, and they do not always show up together. Checking B12 before treating…
- [Thyroid in Pregnancy](https://riimshospitals.com/conditions/general/thyroid-in-pregnancy.html): Thyroid hormone needs change as soon as pregnancy begins. Any woman already on thyroid medication who becomes pregnant needs prompt testing and a dose…

## Doctors & specialist care

- [Kidney Specialist in Delhi NCR — Dr. Abhishek Gupta](https://riimshospitals.com/doctors/kidney-specialist-delhi-ncr.html): Coming to a kidney specialist from Delhi NCR? This is what a consultation at RIIMS Baraut involves, from the reports you bring to the follow-up plan.
- [Kidney Doctor in Delhi-NCR & Baraut — Dr. Abhishek Gupta](https://riimshospitals.com/doctors/best-kidney-doctor-delhi-ncr.html): Looking for an experienced, ethical kidney doctor near Delhi-NCR? Dr. Abhishek Gupta leads integrated, report-based kidney care at RIIMS in Baraut, within…
- [High Creatinine Specialist — Dr. Abhishek Gupta](https://riimshospitals.com/doctors/high-creatinine-specialist.html): A raised creatinine is a signal to investigate calmly, not a diagnosis on its own. Dr. Abhishek Gupta helps you understand why it is high and what to do…
- [Kidney Failure Specialist — Dr. Abhishek Gupta](https://riimshospitals.com/doctors/kidney-failure-specialist.html): A kidney-failure diagnosis is frightening, but the right information changes everything. Dr. Abhishek Gupta helps you understand your stage and the…
- [Kidney Stone Specialist — Dr. Abhishek Gupta](https://riimshospitals.com/doctors/kidney-stone-specialist.html): Kidney stones cause severe pain and can come back. Dr. Abhishek Gupta helps with evaluation, safe treatment guidance and, above all, preventing the next…
- [UTI Specialist — Urinary Infection Care](https://riimshospitals.com/doctors/uti-specialist.html): Burning urination and frequent infections are common, and usually treatable. Dr. Abhishek Gupta helps diagnose, treat and prevent urinary tract…
- [Kidney Doctor for Diabetic Patients — Dr. Abhishek Gupta](https://riimshospitals.com/doctors/kidney-doctor-for-diabetic-patients.html): Diabetes is a leading cause of kidney disease, but early, coordinated care can protect your kidneys. Dr. Abhishek Gupta helps diabetic patients screen for…
- [Nephrologist in Delhi NCR — How Kidney Care at RIIMS Works](https://riimshospitals.com/doctors/best-nephrologist-delhi-ncr.html): Searching for a nephrologist in Delhi NCR? RIIMS kidney care is led by an Ayurvedacharya (B.A.M.S.), and we refer to a nephrologist when you need one.

## Patient guides

- [How Your Kidneys Work (and How Disease Begins)](https://riimshospitals.com/how-kidneys-work.html): Learn what your kidneys do, their 7 jobs, how kidney disease quietly begins, CKD vs AKI, and the early warning signs worth testing for.
- [Understand Your Kidney Reports](https://riimshospitals.com/understand-kidney-reports.html): Read your kidney reports the honest way: creatinine, eGFR, urine protein, potassium, Hb and ultrasound, and why one number never tells the full story.
- [Kidney Diet & the RiiMS Renal Plate](https://riimshospitals.com/kidney-diet-renal-plate.html): A definitive, India-aware kidney diet guide: the RiiMS Renal Plate, protein, sodium, potassium, phosphorus, fluids and the 6 tastes, personalised to you.
- [Ayurvedic Herbs Studied for Kidney Health: An Honest Guide](https://riimshospitals.com/ayurvedic-kidney-herbs.html): An evidence-honest look at Ayurvedic herbs studied for kidney health: Punarnava, Gokshura, Varuna and more. Supportive only, never cures, always…
- [Kidney Disease: Myths vs Facts (and Common Mistakes)](https://riimshospitals.com/kidney-myths-facts.html): Common kidney myths delay timely testing and treatment. Get calm, report-led facts, the biggest mistakes patients make, and what every CKD patient should…
- [Everyday Symptoms in Kidney Disease: Gentle Supportive Care](https://riimshospitals.com/everyday-symptom-care.html): Gentle, kitchen-level comfort measures for 9 common kidney-disease symptoms, alongside medical care, with clear red-flag signs to see a doctor promptly.
- [Your 30-Day Kidney Health Plan & Checklist](https://riimshospitals.com/30-day-kidney-plan.html): A simple 30-day plan of daily habits, weekly checks and a yes/no kidney health checklist to build a lasting routine alongside your doctor's care.

## Blog

- [High Creatinine: Symptoms, Causes & When to Worry](https://riimshospitals.com/blog/high-creatinine-symptoms-causes.html): Tiredness, swelling and foamy urine: understand what a raised creatinine level really means and the safe next steps. A plain-language RIIMS kidney-care…

- [Can Ayurveda Help Kidney Patients? An Honest, Integrated View](https://riimshospitals.com/blog/ayurveda-kidney-care-integrated.html): How Ayurveda-supported lifestyle care works alongside nephrology rather than instead of it, and what claims to be cautious about. A plain-language RIIMS…
- [How to Reduce Creatinine Safely: Doctor-Guided Steps](https://riimshospitals.com/blog/reduce-creatinine-safely.html): Evidence-aware ways to manage high creatinine (diet, hydration, BP and sugar control) without unsafe shortcuts or false promises. A plain-language RIIMS…
- [Dialysis Explained: Myths vs Facts for Indian Patients](https://riimshospitals.com/blog/dialysis-myths-vs-facts.html): Separating fear-driven myths from what dialysis actually involves, when it is needed, and how to prepare with your doctor. A plain-language RIIMS…
- [Protein in Urine (Proteinuria): What It Means](https://riimshospitals.com/blog/protein-in-urine-meaning.html): Why protein leaks into urine, how it is tested, and what foamy urine can signal about your kidney health. A plain-language RIIMS kidney-care guide…
- [Diabetes & Kidney Disease: Protecting Your Kidneys](https://riimshospitals.com/blog/diabetes-kidney-disease.html): Diabetic kidney disease is common in India. Learn the early signs and how tight sugar and BP control protects your kidneys. A plain-language RIIMS…
- [Swelling in Feet & Face: Could It Be Your Kidneys?](https://riimshospitals.com/blog/swelling-feet-face-kidneys.html): When edema points to the kidneys, what tests help, and when swelling means you should consult a kidney doctor. A plain-language RIIMS kidney-care guide…
- [Kidney Stones & UTI: Prevention Tips for India](https://riimshospitals.com/blog/kidney-stones-uti-prevention.html): Hydration, diet and lifestyle habits that lower your risk of kidney stones and urinary infections in a hot climate. A plain-language RIIMS kidney-care…
